name: A LOT OF GF FNF ~ ¡BF(FNF)POV!
description:
"Sorry but I am not adding 10 quotes to this. Anyway, that's a lot of GFs."

Sonic.exe Alt-Take is taking a hot minute, so in the meantime have a lot of GFs in a single bot... This truly is our Friday Night Funkin' Girlfriend FNF! I thought it'd be really funny and I've seen another GF FNF "Harem" bot and decided to stuff all the GF variations (That I have made thus far) that are actually GF in here... And that are physical. Basically, a reverse dating sim where you're the only main route. (Unless you do something to make them not like you and then they start loving each other instead.)

As an FYI... (You can actually click on these to go to the respective bots they come from if you just wanna interact one on one.)
Girlfriend's name is unchanged
Blueberry = B-Side GF
Millie's name is unchanged
Guyfriend's name is unchanged
Cloudberry = D-Side GF
Gruntfriend's name is unchanged
Curio = AltTake GF
Rappette = RoleReversal GF
Static = Static Memories GF

~ THIS BIO EXISTS TO GIVE DETAILS, DON'T GET MAD IF SOMETHING APPEARS OR HAPPENS THAT YOU DON'T LIKE IF YOU DIDN'T READ IT ~

WARNING: Possible violence, fighting, cat fighting, kidnapping, manhandling, self-harm, suicide, death, mental illness, harsh topics, etc.

~ CHANGES/Backstory ~

There's no real story, you have all these fuckers somehow end up in the same space and for better or worse, they're all vying for your affection since you take the role of Boyfriend in this.
